item.title: 8 Thoughtful Etsy Gifts for the Organized Dad This Father’s Day
item.description:
Father’s Day is the perfect time to show appreciation for the dads who keep everything running like a well-oiled machine. If your dad is the kind who has a label maker, always knows where the keys are, and takes pride in a tidy workspace, this list is for you.

We’ve rounded up 8 Etsy gift ideas that blend function with a personal touch—perfect for the organized dad in your life.

1. Personalized Leather Valet Tray

A designated space for everyday essentials like keys, wallet, and loose change? Yes, please. These handcrafted trays keep clutter at bay and look great on a dresser or entry table.

👉 Shop personalized valet trays on Etsy

2. Custom Wooden Desk Organizer

Keep his workspace sleek and stress-free with a wooden organizer designed to hold pens, glasses, phones, and more. Choose one that can be engraved with his name or a Father’s Day message.

item.title: How to share Canva templates | How to share Canva design to edit
item.description:
Canva is a great tool for creating beautiful designs. But if you want to share your templates with others, you need to do it the right way. In this blog post, we will show you how to share a Canva template so that others can edit it.

Watch the video

https://youtu.be/edX3Q17IR1Q

The Wrong Way to Share Canva Templates

The most common mistake people make when sharing Canva templates is that they share the whole file. This means that anyone who has the link can edit your template. This is not ideal if you are selling your templates or if you want to keep control over your designs.

The Right Way to Share Canva Templates

The correct way to share a Canva template is to use the template link. This link will allow others to view and edit your template, but they will not be able to edit the original file. This is important because it means that you can keep control over your designs and make changes to them as needed.

item.title: Faceless Digital Marketing tips for Beginners
item.description:
https://youtu.be/MZh4ysv_QDQ

This video is a comprehensive guide to succeeding in faceless digital marketing.

Here are some key advice:

  1. Invest in Learning: Prioritize understanding digital marketing principles through free resources like blogs and YouTube tutorials.

  2. Pick a Profitable Niche: Focus on niches that align with personal interests and expertise, such as wealth creation or travel.

  3. Branding Beyond Aesthetics: Develop a brand that reflects your personality and creates a genuine connection with your audience.

  4. Provide Value: Ensure every piece of content serves a purpose, whether it’s educating, entertaining, or inspiring.

  5. Focus on Quality Over Quantity: Produce high-quality content rather than overwhelming your audience with volume.

  6. Keep Reels Short: Optimize content for short attention spans, aiming for 3 to 7 seconds per reel.

item.title: Using OneNote for Digital Planning
item.description:
Feeling like your life is a chaotic to-do list on a sheet of paper about to rip? Yeah, same. There are a ton of digital planning apps out there, but maybe you crave that classic planner feel. Enter OneNote, your everyday note-taking buddy that secretly rocks at digital planning too!

OneNote’s perfect for folks who already love Microsoft stuff or want a planner that feels like the good ol’ days. Plus, it’s surprisingly flexible!

Here’s how OneNote can turn you into a digital planning guru:

1. Building Your Planning Empire:

OneNote doesn’t come with fancy pre-made planners, but that’s the beauty. You’re the boss of how it looks and works. Imagine notebooks as your binders, sections as divider tabs, and pages as your trusty planner sheets. Create a work planner, a life planner, a travel planner – all within the same app!

item.title: Faceless Marketing: How to Create Engaging Content Without Showing Your Face + where to find aesthetic videos
item.description:
Have you ever considered creating online content but felt discouraged by the idea of being on camera? If so, faceless marketing might be the perfect solution for you!

Watch video

https://youtu.be/Hgvbk1seLZU

Faceless creators are individuals who build audiences and share their knowledge and expertise online without ever revealing their faces. This approach offers several advantages, including:

  • Increased privacy: You can maintain a separation between your personal and professional lives.

  • Reduced pressure: Eliminate the stress of constantly needing to be camera-ready.

  • Content focus: By not showing your face, you can concentrate on creating high-quality, niche-specific content that resonates with your target audience.

item.title: How to create a faceless Instagram or Tiktok account to make Passive Income
item.description:
Ever wondered if you can grow on Instagram or TikTok without showing your face and still make some sweet passive income? Good news – it’s totally possible! Let’s dive into how you can create a faceless account on these platforms and turn it into a passive income stream.

1. Niche Down Without Showing Off

First things first, pick a niche that doesn’t require you to be the face of the brand. Think about areas like gaming, cooking, art, travel, books, hobbies, or pets. These niches are perfect for creating content that focuses on the subject rather than on you.

2. Brand It Right

Once you’ve got your niche, it’s all about branding. Instead of personal branding, use clear photos or logos that scream your industry. Your username should also reflect your niche. This way, your brand identity is tied to what you do, not who you are.

item.title: Best digital wedding planners for iPads and tablets
item.description:
Are you feeling overwhelmed with the countless details of wedding planning? Fear not! In the age of digital organization, we’ve got a roundup of some fantastic digital wedding planners that are sure to ease your planning woes. These aren’t just any planners; they’re carefully crafted, feature-rich digital tools designed to make every step of your wedding planning a breeze. From budgeting to seating charts, and keeping track of RSVPs, these planners are your secret weapon to a stress-free wedding. Let’s dive in and discover the perfect digital companion for your big day!

Comprehensive 300-Page Wedding Planner for iPad/Tablet

Planning your dream wedding just got a whole lot easier with this comprehensive 300-page digital wedding planner! Before we delve deeper, let’s clarify what we mean by “refurbished” and “open-box.”

item.title: 10 PLR Digital Planners to Help You Make Passive Income in 2024
item.description:
If you’ve been searching for a way to make passive income, you’re in the right place. Today, we’re diving deep into the world of PLR digital planners available on Etsy. But first, let’s clear up a couple of things.

What is PLR?

PLR stands for “Private Label Rights.” In simple terms, it means you can purchase a product, like a digital planner, and have the rights to rebrand and resell it as your own. Imagine buying a cake mix, adding your own special ingredients, and then selling it as your unique recipe. That’s PLR in a nutshell!

Why Use PLR?

  1. Time-Saver: Creating products from scratch can be time-consuming. With PLR, the groundwork is already done for you.

  2. Cost-Effective: Hiring designers or spending hours designing can be expensive. PLR products are usually affordable.

item.title: 9 Truths About Successful Morning Routines
item.description:
Hey there, morning enthusiasts and skeptics alike! Today, I’m diving into a topic that’s near and dear to my heart: morning routines. We all see those aesthetic morning routines and want to be THAT GIRL. But here are some hard-hitting truths that might just change the way you think about mornings. So grab your coffee, tea, or kale smoothie, and let’s get into it!

The Morning Routine Hype

First off, let’s address the elephant in the room: morning routines are not a magical solution to all your problems. I know, I know, those Instagram posts make it look so dreamy. But the reality is, a morning routine is a practice round for the rest of your day. It’s about training yourself to take on challenges on your terms, not just making your mornings look pretty.

item.title: 7 Tips to Start Your New Academic Year Right
item.description:
With the scent of fresh books and new stationery in the air, it’s clear that a new academic year is upon us. Whether you’re brimming with motivation or just trying to get by, here are some tips to help you navigate the upcoming school year with confidence and purpose.

  1. Set Intentions and Realistic Goals
    At the start of every year, many of us make resolutions, even if we don’t always stick to them. The same principle applies to the academic year. What are your aspirations for this semester? Maybe you’re aiming for a better grade in a particular subject or hoping to boost your overall GPA. Perhaps you’re seeking a more balanced student life or even hoping to catch someone’s eye. Whatever your goals, jot them down somewhere visible to keep yourself on track.

item.title: Rediscovering Your Planner: 7 Ways to Infuse New Life into Your Organization Game
item.description:
Ever felt like your planner was your new best friend, and then, well, not so much? Happens to the best of us. But don’t worry, I’ve got some cool tips to help you get that spark back:

  1. Jazz It Up: Think of your planner like a blank canvas. Add some fun stickers, maybe from Amazon or ones that come with it. And hey, colorful pens? Yes, please! Oh, and don’t forget whiteout – because we all make those “oops” moments.

  2. What Goes Where?: Before scribbling away, take a moment. Think about what you want each section to do for you. Like, use the monthly bit for big-picture stuff and the weekly sections for the nitty-gritty details.

  3. Happy Vibes Only: Dedicate a spot in your planner for all the good feels. Jot down words or phrases that light you up – like “dream vacations” or “taco Tuesdays.” Whatever floats your boat!

item.title: The Calming Power of Planning
item.description:
Planning, for many, is not just about organizing tasks or setting reminders for appointments. It’s a ritual, a form of self-care, and a way to visualize the future. Let’s delve into the calming power of planning and why it’s become an essential self-care habit for many.

1. Visualizing the Future

When we sit down with our planners, we’re not just creating schedules or to-do lists. We’re crafting our future. By deciding how long projects will take, when we’ll engage in activities we love, or when we’ll meet loved ones, we’re essentially mapping out our lives. This act of visualizing the future can neutralize anxiety. It allows us to see time in its entirety, helping us differentiate between what’s urgent and what’s not.

item.title: New GoodNotes 6 Update! All you need to know

Pricing Structure

GoodNotes 6 has introduced a new pricing model. Users can opt for a subscription at $9.99 US dollars annually or make a one-time purchase for $29.99 US dollars. There’s also a free version available, but it limits users to a maximum of three notebooks. For those who previously purchased GoodNotes 5, the company is offering tiered discounts based on the purchase date, ranging from 20% to 100% off. Detailed information about these discounts can be found on the GoodNotes website. Users who prefer not to upgrade can continue using GoodNotes 5 but won’t receive the new features and updates.

item.title: How to achieve a Clutter-Free Bathroom
item.description:
Welcome to my new series on practical life skills! As a full-time working mom, I understand the challenges of maintaining a clutter-free home. Neglecting clutter can take a toll on mental health, which is why I’ve decided to share some valuable tips for creating and maintaining an organized bathroom space. Let’s explore practical strategies that will help us achieve an organized and calm environment.

https://youtu.be/IVtqBuADfa8

Step 1: Take stock and categorize:

Start by sorting everything in your bathroom into categories like toiletries, cosmetics, cleaning supplies, and towels. This step provides a clear overview of your belongings and makes it easier to identify areas that need decluttering.

Step 2: Discard expired or unused items:

Dispose of any expired medications, toiletries, or cosmetics. Check expiration dates and eliminate anything that’s no longer safe or usable. Consider letting go of items you haven’t used in a while or won’t use in the future. This step helps free up space and ensures you only keep what you need.

What is PLR?

item.title: Easily make money with PLR planners
item.description:
The world of digital products has been a hot topic lately with all the online business ideas circulating Tiktok and other social media platforms. One exciting area of digital products is the use of PLR Planners, which can be a cost-effective and profitable method to enter this sector. But what is a PLR Planner, and how can it help you sell digital things online? We’ll answer these questions in this blog as we explore the potential of PLR Planners and answer some of the frequently asked questions about this attractive area.

What is a PLR planner?

PLR is an abbreviation for Private Label Rights, which implies you can buy the rights to a product and personalize it to make it your own. A PLR planner is a digital or printable planner template that you may purchase with PLR, allowing you to tweak and adapt the content, design, and branding to meet your or your clients’ needs.

item.title: What are annual flowers
item.description:
Annual flowers are one of the most important factors in a gardener’s toolkit. They provide color and interest to the garden for the entire growing season. Many of these plants are easy to grow and care for, making them perfect for novice gardeners. In this article, we will introduce you to some of the most popular annual flowers, as well as provide tips on how to care for them.

What are annual flowers?

Annual flowers are those that complete their life cycle in one growing season. This means that they sprout from seed, bloom, produce seeds, and die–all within a single year. Many gardeners love annual flowers because they can provide a burst of color and interest to any garden or outdoor space. Plus, since they only last for one season, you can change up your blooms each year to keep things looking fresh. Some popular annual flowers include impatiens, petunias, marigolds, and zinnias.

item.title: What are perennial flowers
item.description:

In this article, we will take a look at what makes a plant a perennial, how to choose the right perennials for your garden, and some of the best-loved varieties.

What is a perennial flower?

A perennial flower is a plant that lives for more than two years. The term is often used to refer to plants that bloom for more than one season.

The benefits of planting perennial flowers

Perennial flowers are a great addition to any garden. They provide color and interest year after year with little maintenance. Here are some of the benefits of planting perennial flowers:

item.title: What is a sensory activity for toddlers?
item.description:
When you think of activities for toddlers, what comes to mind? Probably things like singing nursery rhymes, playing with colorful blocks, or reading stories together. But did you know that there are certain activities that can help stimulate your child’s senses? In this article, we’ll introduce you to some sensory activities for toddlers and explain how they can help your child’s development.

What are sensory activities?

Sensory activities are activities that help stimulate the senses. They can be used to help toddlers learn about their environment and develop their motor skills. Sensory activities can include anything from playing with toys to exploring different textures.

Why are they important for toddlers?

Sensory activities are important for toddlers for a number of reasons. They help to stimulate the senses, which can aid in cognitive development. They also promote fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Additionally, sensory activities can help to calm and focus a toddler who may be feeling overwhelmed or overstimulated.

item.title: What exactly is PLR? A Complete Overview of Private Label Rights
item.description:
If you’re a content creator or entrepreneur, you’ve probably heard of “PLR” or “Private Label Rights.” In a nutshell, PLR is a form of content that you can edit and use as your own. In this blog post, we’ll look at what PLR is, what sorts of content fall under PLR, how to sell PLR goods, generate money with PLR, and edit PLR products to make them distinctive.

What is PLR content?

PLR material is generated by someone else and sold with the right to edit, brand, and use it as your own. PLR material can range from ebooks to articles to blog posts to graphics and more. It’s a well-known resource for entrepreneurs and content providers in need of high-quality material for their businesses.

item.title: Flower bulbs to plant in the fall in the garden
item.description:
Fall is the perfect time to plant flower bulbs in your garden! With the cooler temperatures and rainfall, your bulbs will have a chance to establish themselves before the hot summer sun arrives. Here are some of the best bulbs to plant in the fall, so that you can enjoy beautiful blooms next spring and summer!

What are flower bulbs?

Flower bulbs are an easy and fun way to add color and interest to your garden. They are also a great way to get a head start on your spring gardening. There are many different types of flower bulbs, but the most common ones to plant in the fall are daffodils, tulips, and crocuses.

Daffodils are one of the most popular spring flowers. They come in a variety of colors including yellow, white, and orange. Daffodils are easy to grow and care for. Tulips are another popular spring flower. They come in a wide variety of colors and shapes. Tulips are also easy to grow and care for. Crocuses are one of the first spring flowers to bloom. They come in a variety of colors including purple, yellow, and white. Crocuses are also easy to grow and care for.

NessieCraft came about after a long time of procrastination, followed by some personal tragedies. I needed something to distract me, and I decided that it was time to stop thinking about it and start doing.

item.title: ✨ Shop Spotlight: Little Pencil Design
item.description:
What’s the story behind your shop?

We are the home of cute and punny stationery.

I am a trained graphic designer, however during a difficult time studying my PhD and planning a wedding I got diagnosed with panic disorder. If someone mentioned a date I would have an attack. I couldn’t cope and needed to do something. I ended up down the rabbit hole that is YouTube, and discovered plan with mes.

Soon I was indoctrinated into the world of planning, which allowed me to plan out my time, whilst making it cute and happy, so it was less scary to me. Within a month I started making kits and stickers for myself because I couldn’t find exactly what I wanted. Very quickly, I wanted to quit my research (I didn’t) and I wanted to just work for myself. As soon as I could (8 months later) I set up my shop where I could bring cuteness to others, and I haven’t looked back since. Two years ago I introduced our resident cutie pie Flump and we have building a #flumpfam ever since.

How does S’sycn’t Planners address this? With the Values page, Vision Board Page, and Habit Trackers. item.title: How to budget - budgeting for beginners
item.description:
Are you looking at cleaning up your finances this year? We know, we know - the word alone can make your eyes glaze over, but trust us, once you get the hang of it, it’s like a warm hug for your bank account.

Whether you’re saving for a down payment on a house, paying off debt, or just want to stop living paycheck to paycheck, budgeting can help you get there. And we promise, it’s not as boring as it sounds!

Here’s some tips:

Know thy income and expenses

First things first, you gotta know what’s coming in and what’s going out each month. Write down all your sources of income (even that pesky part-time job you have on the weekends) and then list all your expenses, including bills, groceries, entertainment, and all the little things that add up (looking at you, morning coffee run).

item.title: How to achieve a "witchy" aesthetic
item.description:
What is a “witchy aesthetic?

A “witchy” aesthetic often includes elements of nature, such as plants, herbs, and crystals. It may also incorporate items associated with witchcraft and magic, such as tarot cards, cauldrons, and broomsticks. The color palette is often dark and muted, with shades of black, purple, and deep red. Textures like velvet, suede, and lace are common. The overall vibe is mysterious, with a hint of eeriness and a touch of elegance.

What are some “witchy” imagery?

Decorations like dried flowers, vintage apothecary jars, and candles are also popular in a witchy aesthetic. The imagery used in this aesthetic is often inspired by the occult, like astrology and alchemy symbols, and often featuring imagery of the moon and stars.

item.title: How to start changing your habits - a summary of Atomic Habits
item.description:
James Clear’s book “Atomic Habits” offers a framework for building and maintaining good habits in order to achieve your goals. Here is a guide to help you put the principles from the book into practice:

https://www.amazon.com/Atomic-Habits-Proven-Build-Break/dp/0735211299/ref=sr_1_1?crid=22WUK2N71K0GV&keywords=atomic+habits&qid=1674242099&sprefix=atomic+habits%2Caps%2C152&sr=8-1

Start with the end in mind.

Clearly define your goal and have a clear understanding of what you want to achieve.

Make it obvious.

Create an environment that makes it easy to perform the desired habit. For example, if you want to start running in the morning, put your running shoes next to your bed.

Make it attractive.

Give yourself a reason to perform the habit. This can be as simple as rewarding yourself with a treat after a workout.

Make it easy.

Break down the habit into small, manageable steps. Starting with shorter duration or lower intensity can make it less intimidating.

  • Document Creation and Management
  • Note Taking

Now, you’re probably wondering … So, why did you open a crafting eCommerce business?

I wasn’t the artist in my family, I was the talker and trouble maker, lol. Any artistic abilities that were to be had came from my sister, but God must’ve planted the same ability - another thing that makes me a perpetual late bloomer - in me as well because here I am, lol. item.title: Are digital planners worth it?
item.description:
Digital planners are becoming increasingly popular, but are they worth the investment? The answer may depend on your needs and preferences.

Like any planning system, digital planners can help you stay organized and on track. Here are some benefits of using a digital planner!

Cost effective

You can often find digital planners for a fraction of the price of a traditional paper planner.

Environmentally friendly

If you’re looking to be more eco-conscious, a digital planner is a great option. There’s no need to use paper or other materials, and you can even recycle your old digital planner when you’re done with it.

Customizable

With a digital planner, you can usually customize it to fit your needs and preferences. This might include changing the layout, adding or removing features, or choosing from a variety of pre-made templates.

item.description:
How to EDIT Digital Planners on iPad using PDFelement

I like using these widgets because I like the flexibility in my planning. Sometimes I can’t find a certain insert that fits all my needs on a daily or by weekly basis. Sometimes I need more sections and sometimes my days are just really boring and there’s nothing to note down.

item.title: How to start journaling
item.description:
If you’re looking to get started in journaling, and don’t know where to start, don’t worry! This post will help you get started.

First of all, there are no rules for journaling, but it’s a great tool for self discovery.  All you need to get started is a paper or digital notebook!

Here are my suggestions:

  • Paper notebook

  • Digital notebook

What is journaling?

Journaling is a great way to capture your thoughts.  Sometimes having too many things on your mind can bog you down and create unpleasant side effects like insomnia or anxiety.  Journaling helps unload all that stress from your mind and give you a fresh start to the day.

Here are a few ways to journal.

1. Morning pages 

This method is from a book called “the Artist’s way”.  How it works is that you dedicate some time to writing three pages of longhand stream of consciousness writing in the morning.  This meant to help your brain dump your thoughts on to the paper.

item.title: What are habit trackers and why use it?
item.description:
What are habit trackers? Habit trackers are used to help you keep track of your goals, either daily, weekly, monthly or even yearly.  

In some studies, it shows that it takes an average of two months before you form a habit, so it is important to be consistent and keep track of habits you want to form. 

Here are a few reasons using a habit tracker can help you

Habit trackers makes your goals feel more achievable

Sometimes setting a new goal can be overwhelming.  Using a habit tracker can help you break down steps to achieve your goals.

Habit trackers gives you confidence

Using a habit tracker helps you see your progress visually and to remind you how far you’ve come on your journey!  It is especially rewarding to see your goals achieved!

Drag and drop

item.title: How to use OneNote for your digital planner
item.description:
OneNote is a digital note-taking tool that can help you plan and organize your life. Whether you’re a student, an entrepreneur, or just someone looking for a better way to keep track of your tasks and ideas, OneNote has everything you need to streamline your planning process. In this post, we’ll explore the key features of OneNote and how you can use them to take your digital planning to the next level.

Create Notebooks and Pages

OneNote is organized into notebooks, and each notebook is made up of pages. To start using OneNote for planning, you should create a new notebook specifically for your planning. Within this notebook, create pages for each area of your life that you want to plan. For example, you might have a page for work tasks, a page for personal tasks, and a page for your grocery list.

The best digital planners for GoodNotes in 2023
item.description:
Are you looking for the best digital planner for 2023? Look no further than the planners on this list! These planners are perfect for anyone who wants to be more organized and productive in the new year. From simple to-do lists to complex schedules, these planners can help you get it all done. And with so many great features, you’re sure to find one that’s perfect for you. So take a look and start planning for a great year ahead!

What is a digital planner?

A digital planner is a PDF planner that helps you keep track of your schedule and to-do list. It can be used on an iPad, tablet, or Android phone. You can use a PDF annotation app like Goodnotes to write down appointments and reminders for yourself, and it can be synced across all your devices.

item.title: Where to find freebies for digital planning
item.description:
If you’re looking for a way to save money? Using a digital planner is a great option. You can reuse your digital planner over and over again, so you don’t have to keep buying new planners every year. Plus, you can easily access your digital planner from your computer or phone, so you can always have it with you. But when you’re first getting started, you might want to find some freebies to see if digital planning is your jam!

Here is a round of up some places you get freebies for digital planning!

**Check back often as we’ll be updating this list when we find more freebies
**

DPC Digitals is a goldmine for digital planner enthusiasts. They offer a wide range of freebies that are perfect for GoodNotes users. From colorful stickers to functional planner templates, their free resources are a great way to enhance your digital planning experience. Whether you’re looking for something fun or more professional, DPC Digitals has something for everyone.

item.title: How to manage time with a chronodex: A Beginner's Guide
item.description:
Today, let’s talk about a tool that’s as cool as its name sounds: the Chronodex. If you’ve been struggling with traditional planners or just want to try something new, this might be the game-changer you’ve been waiting for.

What’s a Chronodex, Anyway?

Imagine a clock and a planner had a baby. That’s a Chronodex for you—a circular, clock-like diagram that helps you visualize your day in a 24-hour format. Instead of jotting down tasks in a linear list, you allocate them in a circle, much like the hands of a clock. It’s a unique way to see how your day unfolds, and for visual thinkers, it’s a dream come true.

Why Should You Use a Chronodex?

Before we dive into the “how,” let’s talk about the “why.” Traditional planners are great, but they’re, well, linear. Life isn’t always so straightforward. The Chronodex offers a more fluid, intuitive way to plan your day. You can see overlaps, free spaces, and how much time you’re actually dedicating to different tasks. Plus, it’s just fun to use. Coloring in those segments can be oddly satisfying, almost like a mini art project that helps you get stuff done.

item.title: How to Plan Using Stickers and Widgets
item.description:

So simply put it it can be an additional sticker that you put to add a new section to your platter that isn’t already there.

I like using these widgets because I’m very fluid in my planning. Sometimes I can’t find a certain insert that fits all my needs on a day today or by week basis. Sometimes I need more sections and sometimes my days are just really boring and there’s nothing to note down. Having these widgets allow me to be flexible in my planner and how I plan my days. It also helps that I don’t have to commit to a certain insert or planner because I can just use these to help add whatever I need.

item.title: 10 tips for personal growth
item.description:
There are many things you can do to grow as a person, both physically and mentally. In this article, we’ve put together 10 tips that can help you on your personal growth journey. From taking ownership of your own development to embracing change, these tips will help you reach your full potential.

1. Be willing to change your perspective.

When we start looking at our lives through different lenses, we begin to see opportunities that were before hidden from us. By shifting our focus, we open ourselves up to new possibilities and experiences that can lead us down new paths of self-discovery.

2. Challenge yourself constantly.

There is no such thing as stagnation when it comes to personal growth; by testing yourself in new ways, you give yourself the opportunity to grow in all areas of your life.

item.title: Ways to Use a Digital Notebook
item.description:
Are you a fan of writing everything down in a notebook? If you have already been using the classical paper version, you might wonder why you need a digital notebook?

Why Should You Use a Digital Notebook?

True, the digital version covers the same needs as the paper notebook. Yet it brings some extra benefits. Besides the usual tasks (writing down ideas, events, making lists) the digital version allows you to add, remove, rearrange your notes, as often as you need. The good news is you will finally get rid of the uncomfortable rings that hold all the paper pages together. Now you can flip the pages back and forth as long as you wish without any damage to your information.

The most common way to digital plan is to use an iPad or tablet as a digital writing surface using a pen or stylus. You can read more about how to get started in digital planning in this blog post.

item.title: Which is Better: A Paper Planner or a Digital Planner?
item.description:
If you’re debating whether or not to make the transition to digital planning, here’s a lengthy list of benefits and drawbacks to consider:

The Advantages and Disadvantages of Digital Planning

Pros of Digital Planners

  • It’s simple to alter plans. The lasso tool enables you to duplicate activities from one day, week, or month to the next.
  • You can use any pen color you like. Additionally, you may alter the color of your text after it has been typed.
  • There is no need for a printer, printer ink, or paper.
  • No need to perform routine printer maintenance to keep the colors vibrant.
  • If you duplicate any hyperlinked page, all of the links will still work.
  • Purchase the iPad just once and continue planning for years
  • Can sync plans across different devices, such as your iPad and iPhone

Cons of Digital Planners

  • Writing with an Apple Pencil is more difficult than writing with a real pen. Although similar in form, the pencil is much heavier and requires some adjustment.
  • Must toggle between writing and read-only modes. To browse a digital planner or notepad using hyperlinked tabs, the read-only mode must be chosen.
  • Can type text if you don’t want to write it by hand, but it’s not the greatest feature - it’s tough to edit text after it’s been typed, and entering text using the iPad’s on-screen keyboard takes longer - it’s faster to simply write it.
  • It’s detrimental to your eyes to spend the whole day staring at a screen.
  • If your planner’s battery runs out, you will be unable to view it unless you have synced it with your smartphone.
  • On paper, you may be more creative - you are not limited to digital tools, stickers, and the like.

I suggest utilizing a digital planner if you’re interested in the following:

item.title: How to start using a digital planner
item.description:
A digital planner is the most recent organizational and planning fad. This approach is enjoyable and easy to learn if you’re going paperless or just want to start using a planner without spending a lot of money. Starting with a paper planner doesn’t take a lot of resources, but if you want to incorporate stickers and fancy pens, it will.

A tablet is all that is required to begin using a digital planner. This blog is a fantastic place to start whether you’re thinking about converting to digital or have never used a planner before.

Digital planning can open a lot of doors for creative planners and for productivity. With either an iPad or an Android tablet, you can transformed and notes and planners into a fun paperless experience. Many digital calendars, digital stickers, and notebooks have appeared since the introduction of the use of tablets, and their popularity is growing.

item.title: How to start a Blog in 2022
item.description:
There’s been so many new ways to make money and ways to create content through social media nowadays - so does that mean blogging is dead?  After all, there are already millions of blogs out there. Why add one more? 

It’s our new way of getting information

Whether it’s your news, magazine or other reading material, you can bet that blogging will be here to stay.  It’s just THE way to get information these days.  

It might not be called a “blog” anymore, but websites or any kind is the way of life now. It is where all information is located.  And everybody is searching for things on the internet.

So you’re thinking of turning a blog in 2022 is it too late to start a blog actually it’s a great time to start blog because it’s never too late.

item.title: 10 Creative Ways to Use Your Air Fryer
item.description:
Air fryers are a healthy alternative to deep-frying that will satisfy your cravings for foods that typically have a lot of fat. For instance, you can enjoy some crispy french fries without the guilt!

Air fryers use rapid air circulation for cooking food. They come with temperature controls, so you don’t have to worry about burning your foods.

Plus, air fryers are versatile too so you can easily create foods with any air fryer recipes!

You can use it to air fry, reheat leftovers, melt cheese, toast nuts, and much more! Here are ten creative ways to use your air fryer.

Easily Roast an Eggplant

If you love eggplants but have trouble cooking them perfectly every time, the Airfryer is for you.

item.title: Blogging Income Report | January 2022
item.description:
January 2022

A new year means new ventures!  I started this in the last few months of 2021 as a “home” for all my freebies and resources.  This year, I want to grow it and see how far I can go!

If you’d like to follow along with how I’m monetizing my blog and other online platforms, then check back every month for my income reports!

As a disclosure, this is not my first time making money online, so I already have some experience. You can see my old income reports here - but I’ve taken a huge hiatus since then and am coming back with little to now product and a brand new blog!  Nothing comes without some trial and error!  I’m coming back refreshed with a new mindset to try and grow my digital strategies.  My goal this time is to share it here because I know people that are just starting out would love to see all the things that go on behind the scenes!

item.title: Income Report - February 2022
item.description:
The second month of the year and I have lots of ideas!!

I’ve been trying to scale back and trying to keep my content alive - if that’s even possible.  So in order to do this, I’ve tried out a lot of new software this month!

Well, enough talk, let’s dig into our income report for 2022.

Here are a few things I’ll cover in this report

item.title: DIY Nail Wrap Review - Nail Wrap from Etsy
item.description:
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=n00ZxIVmcMg&t=158s

I’ve been wanting to try some nail art for a while now, since we’re in lock down. I’ve been looking at the difference between gel nails, nail wraps and press on nails.

I’ve finally decided to give nail wraps a try cause it seems mess free and easy to use.

Here are some nail wraps I got from Etsy from a shop called Olive and Pearl

The style I got was Black Floral Abstract Nail Wrap

Overall, it was very easy to use

Some stickers might not fit perfectly, so you’ll need to resize

But with my short nails, I was able to use only one side of the nail wraps, so each set actually can give me two or more sets if I size them accurately.

item.title: Get featured on our website!
item.description:
As a planner shop owner and member of the planner community, I can understand how much work it takes to run and shop and get the exposure you deserve for your products!

I know I love discovering news shops all the time and believe in supporting our small shops. This is why I would like to feature your shop and products for FREE on my blog and my newsletter dedicated for planner lovers.

Where I will feature your shop and products:

  • Monthly Newsletter to 800+ subscribers
  • Facebook Page/ Facebook Group
  • Instagram

Depending on time:

  • Blog
  • Youtube
  • Pinterest

I will do my best to tag/ notify you on all your featured locations so you can repost/etc… :)

If this is something that you’d like to participate in here’s what we need to gets started:

item.title: #StandWithSmall
item.description:
These days it feels like my days are blending together I’m losing motivation to do a lot of things. How about you?

One helpful way I find that keeps me motivated and helps set my days straight is to journal or plan. I have been listing my top three items I want to do daily so I can set some priorities for myself.  But, not all days need to feel productive and it’s also OK to not want to do anything.

Maybe it’s time to finally take that me time you’ve been putting away.  When I’m looking to unwind and practice my creativity, I’ll either write or doodle in my journals.  These days, I’ve been using digital journals and planners because I can bring them with me anywhere and they also save space.

item.title: Privacy Policy
item.description:
Planner Lovin’ Privacy Policy

This Privacy Policy describes how your personal information is collected, used, and shared when you visit or make a purchase from plannerlovin.com (the “Site”).

PERSONAL INFORMATION WE COLLECT

When you visit the Site, we automatically collect certain information about your device, including information about your web browser, IP address, time zone, and some of the cookies that are installed on your device. Additionally, as you browse the Site, we collect information about the individual web pages or products that you view, what websites or search terms referred you to the Site, and information about how you interact with the Site. We refer to this automatically-collected information as “Device Information.”

We collect Device Information using the following technologies:

item.title: Income Report 💰 July 2016
item.description:
JULY INCOME REPORT

Etsy Income: $305.63
Shopify Store: $642.11
Collaboration revenue 1: $109.73
Collaboration revenue 2: $26.08
Other contributions: $8.13

Total Income: $1091.68

JULY EXPENSES

Shopify hosting*: $119.91

Etsy fees: oops..I forgot to pay
Paypal fees: $34.25
Affiliate commission: $49.77
Advertising and promotion: $40.52
Misc business charges: $170

Total Expenses: $414.45 (Anything with an * next to it is an affiliate link)

Net Profit: $677.23

☘☘☘

July Shop Update

July was a month of reflection.  I am slowly switching gears and trying to find balance in my personal life.  I’ve been neglecting my health and just social circles the few months since I’ve been really focusing on my side-hustle business.  Towards the end of this month, I’ve decided to put my shop in the back burner a bit and focus on my personal goals. Because of this, I expect next month to have a bit of dip in sales + profit.

item.title: Income Report 💰 June 2016
item.description:
JUNE INCOME REPORT

Etsy Income: $515.60
Shopify Store: $142.81
Collaboration revenue 1: $244.34
Collaboration revenue 2: $375.11
Other contributions: $2.46

Total Income: $1280.32

JUNE EXPENSES

Shopify hosting*: $32.11
Etsy fees: $222.60
Paypal fees: $7.72
Affiliate commission: $26.09
Advertising and promotion: $24.75
Wireless charges: $153.18

Total Expenses: $466.45 (Anything with an * next to it is an affiliate link)

Net Profit: $781.55

June was a busy month.  I have been putting my shop in the back burner for a bit because I’ve shifted my focus for a bit for personal reasons and I was also on a little mini vacation to Hawaii!  

But this was also the the month where I decided to get back full force and do some major house keeping for my shop.

item.title: Income Report 💰 May 2016
item.description:
So… I’ve been seeing these around a lot.  I always wonder why people would post their income report and …I still wonder.  There may be many reasons, but I want to start posting mine because I want to reflect on my growth (or lack of) each month – and hopefully this exercise will push me to stay on top of my bookkeeping!! So here goes…

MAY INCOME

Etsy Income: $78.17
Shopify Store: $106.38
Collaboration revenue: $662.05

Total Income: $846.60

MAY EXPENSES

Shopify hosting*: $148.96
Paypal fees: $6.68
Affiliate commission: $4.54
Advertising and promotion: $55.48

Total Expenses: $215.66 (Anything with an * next to it is an affiliate link)

Net Profit: $630.97

As you can see, I’m pretty small peanuts compared to other people out there.  I might also note that this has been one of the “good” months because some payments only came through now from last month.  So this is also a good lesson that what you see on someone’s inflated monthly income can be a big deceiving sometimes.
